---
title: "Introduction to the Introduction"
author: "Nicky Wakim"
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-color: "#3070BF"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: "../simple_NW.scss"
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    width: 1955
    height: 1100
    footer: "Introduction to the Introduction"
    html-math-method: mathjax
    highlight-style: arrow
execute:
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

## What will we learn?

::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
In this class, we will cover the following topics:

- Importing data
- Tidying data
- Transforming data
- Visualizing data
- Summarizing data
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
![[Figure from R for Data Science TB](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/intro.html#fig-ds-diagram)](../img_slides/DS_process.png)
:::
:::
